title: Animated Mojang Logo
description: Replaced the old (boring) Minecraft loading screen!
body:
# Animated Mojang Logo 2.0

This mod aims to replace the old boring Minecraft loading screen with the nice animation from Minecraft Dungeons / MC Live with the accompanying jingle.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XcxB1q6AOf4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Config
This mod now has a custom config screen accessed by modmenu. You can configure the colors aswell as some miscellaneous settings

![gif of the config ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d277fbd8cd534523cdc6e998fe9e383363c523cc.gif)
